{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "graph-operations-01",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Graph operations\n",
    "\n",
    "This notebook shows common editing and transformation operations for `UrbanGraph` objects.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "graph-operations-02",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T12:11:13.104615Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T12:11:13.104615Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T12:11:13.109639Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T12:11:13.109132Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:01.481691Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:01.476481Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "# To install IduEdu in a clean environment:\n",
    "# !pip install IduEdu\n",
    "\n",
    "OSM_ID = 1114252\n"
   ],
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 1
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "graph-operations-03",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T12:11:13.111671Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T12:11:13.110663Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.359632Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.359632Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:10.594706Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:01.484533Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from iduedu import get_walk_graph\n",
    "\n",
    "G = get_walk_graph(osm_id=OSM_ID, simplify=False, keep_largest_subgraph=True)\n",
    "print(G)\n"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "2026-07-07 15:18:10.561 | WARNING  | Removing 618 nodes outside the largest connected component. Retaining 38246 of 38864 nodes.\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "UrbanGraph(nodes=38246, edges=45042, is_multigraph=True, is_directed=False, edge_direction_column=None, crs='EPSG:32636', type='walk')\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 2
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "graph-operations-04",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Induced subgraph and relabeling\n",
    "\n",
    "`subgraph_by_nodes` preserves original node ids. `relabel` converts them to a dense `RangeIndex`.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "graph-operations-05",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.361238Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.361238Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.381630Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.381111Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:10.663783Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:10.643420Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "nodes = G.nodes_gdf.index[:150]\n",
    "subgraph = G.subgraph_by_nodes(nodes)\n",
    "relabeled = subgraph.relabel()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"subgraph index sample:\", list(subgraph.nodes_gdf.index[:5]))\n",
    "print(\"relabeled index sample:\", list(relabeled.nodes_gdf.index[:5]))\n",
    "print(subgraph)\n",
    "print(relabeled)\n"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "subgraph index sample: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]\n",
      "relabeled index sample: [0, 1, 2, 3, 4]\n",
      "UrbanGraph(nodes=150, edges=146, is_multigraph=True, is_directed=False, edge_direction_column=None, crs='EPSG:32636', type='walk')\n",
      "UrbanGraph(nodes=150, edges=146, is_multigraph=True, is_directed=False, edge_direction_column=None, crs='EPSG:32636', type='walk')\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 3
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "graph-operations-06",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Clip by geometry\n",
    "\n",
    "`clip` keeps nodes inside a polygon and then keeps edges whose endpoints remain in the graph. The polygon must be in the graph CRS.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "graph-operations-07",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.383695Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.383176Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.443460Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.442939Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:10.734570Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:10.674Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "center = G.nodes_gdf.geometry.iloc[0]\n",
    "clip_polygon = center.buffer(700)\n",
    "clipped = G.clip(clip_polygon).relabel()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"before:\", len(G.nodes_gdf), \"nodes,\", len(G.edges_gdf), \"edges\")\n",
    "print(\"after :\", len(clipped.nodes_gdf), \"nodes,\", len(clipped.edges_gdf), \"edges\")\n"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "before: 38246 nodes, 45042 edges\n",
      "after : 5365 nodes, 6459 edges\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 4
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "graph-operations-08",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.445018Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T12:11:22.445018Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.351862Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.351862Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:12.607949Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:10.741929Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "import geopandas as gpd\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "clip_boundary = gpd.GeoSeries([clip_polygon], crs=G.crs)\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 7))\n",
    "G.edges_gdf.plot(ax=ax, color=\"#8FA1AB\", linewidth=0.65, alpha=0.65)\n",
    "clipped.edges_gdf.plot(ax=ax, color=\"#496A81\", linewidth=1.0, alpha=0.9)\n",
    "clip_boundary.boundary.plot(ax=ax, color=\"#D84A3A\", linewidth=1.5)\n",
    "ax.set_axis_off()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 700x700 with 1 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 5
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "graph-operations-09",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Multiedge simplification\n",
    "\n",
    "`simplify_multiedges` collapses parallel edges by selecting the min or max value of an edge weight.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "graph-operations-10",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.354870Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.353869Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.424435Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.424435Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:12.672116Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:12.618974Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "simple_graph = G.simplify_multiedges(weight=\"time_min\", rule=\"min\")\n",
    "print(\"multigraph:\", G.is_multigraph, \"edges:\", len(G.edges_gdf))\n",
    "print(\"simple    :\", simple_graph.is_multigraph, \"edges:\", len(simple_graph.edges_gdf))\n"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "multigraph: True edges: 45042\n",
      "simple    : False edges: 45042\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 6
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "graph-operations-11",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Directed and undirected views\n",
    "\n",
    "Use these transformations when an algorithm needs a specific direction model.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "graph-operations-12",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.426447Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.426447Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.477213Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.477213Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:12.719460Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:12.679537Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "directed = G.to_directed(edge_direction_column=\"oneway\", default_direction_value=False)\n",
    "undirected = directed.to_undirected()\n",
    "\n",
    "print(directed.is_directed, directed.edge_direction_column)\n",
    "print(undirected.is_directed, undirected.edge_direction_column)\n"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "True oneway\n",
      "False None\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 7
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "graph-operations-13",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Joining compatible graphs\n",
    "\n",
    "`join_urban_graphs` and `UrbanGraph.join` concatenate compatible graph tables. The example below offsets node ids in the second small graph to avoid key collisions.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "id": "graph-operations-14",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.479221Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.479221Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.541533Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-07-07T12:11:24.541533Z"
    },
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:12.789687Z",
     "start_time": "2026-07-07T12:18:12.732040Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "left = clipped.relabel()\n",
    "right = clipped.copy().relabel()\n",
    "\n",
    "node_offset = int(left.nodes_gdf.index.max()) + 1 if len(left.nodes_gdf) else 0\n",
    "right.nodes_gdf.index = right.nodes_gdf.index + node_offset\n",
    "if not right.edges_gdf.empty:\n",
    "    right.edges_gdf[\"u\"] = right.edges_gdf[\"u\"] + node_offset\n",
    "    right.edges_gdf[\"v\"] = right.edges_gdf[\"v\"] + node_offset\n",
    "right.validate()\n",
    "\n",
    "joined = left.join(right, graph_type=\"joined_walk_sample\")\n",
    "joined\n"
   ],
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "UrbanGraph(nodes=10730, edges=12918, is_multigraph=True, is_directed=False, edge_direction_column=None, crs='EPSG:32636', type='joined_walk_sample')"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 8,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 8
  }
 ],
